info.description: SecureVault is a secure file storage service with S3 integration, user authentication, file sharing, and administrative features.
info.title: SecureVault API

get.description: Get a paginated list of all files in the system with admin-level details

200.description: List of all files with admin details

delete.description: Admin can delete any file regardless of ownership (includes S3 cleanup)

post.description: Promote an existing user to admin role (admin only)
Create a new admin user account with email and password

get.description: Get comprehensive system-wide statistics including users, files, storage, and analytics

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password to get JWT token
Create a new user account with email and password

get.description: Get a paginated list of files owned by the authenticated user with optional filtering

post.description: Upload a new file to secure storage with optional tags

400.description: Invalid request or no file provided

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific file including metadata and share link

delete.description: Delete a file owned by the authenticated user (includes S3 cleanup)

get.description: Download file content with proper headers and content disposition

patch.description: Move a file to a different folder or root
Make a file public or private. When made public, generates a share link. When made private, removes the share link.

200.description: Updated file with share link info (if public)

400.description: Invalid file ID or JSON body

get.description: Get folders and files within a specific folder (or root)

post.description: Create a new folder in the user's file system

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific folder including breadcrumbs

delete.description: Delete a folder and all its contents

patch.description: Update folder name or move to different parent

post.description: Create a public share link for a folder and automatically make all nested files public
post.summary: Create folder share link with file publicity

200.description: Share link created successfully with files made public

delete.description: Remove the public share link for a folder and revert files to original publicity state
delete.summary: Delete folder share link with file publicity reversion

204.description: Share link deleted successfully with files reverted

404.description: Folder or share link not found

get.description: Check whether a folder has any active sharelinks and return the token if exists

200.description: Sharelink status retrieved successfully with token if exists

get.description: Check if the service is running and healthy
Access a folder via public share token (no authentication required)
Download a publicly shared file using share token (no authentication required)

head.description: Download a publicly shared file using share token (no authentication required)

get.description: Get paginated list of all public files for a specific owner (no authentication required)
get.summary: Get all public files by owner ID

get.description: Get file details using share token (no authentication required)
get.summary: Get public file details by share token

get.description: Download file content using share token (no authentication required)
Get file details for public files (no authentication required)
get.summary: Get public file details by ID

get.description: Download file content for public files (no authentication required)
Get complete folder tree structure with all subfolders and files using share token (no authentication required)
get.summary: Get public folder tree by share token

200.description: Folder tree with subfolders and files

get.description: Get comprehensive statistics for the authenticated user including storage usage, file counts, and upload history

parameters.description: Grouping for upload history (day, week, month, year)
parameters.name: group_by

delete.description: Delete a user account (user can only delete their own account)

403.description: Forbidden - can only delete own account

patch.description: Update a user's password (user can only update their own password)

403.description: Forbidden - can only update own password

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
